evolutionSummary: Project evolution: 107 issues and 37 PRs processed, yielding 3 new fingerprints—_TZE284_aaeasoll, example, and vision (all TS0601) sourced from community request #1379—expanding coverage while preserving legacy anchors. Core stability improved via time-sync fixes (10-byte seq-aware payloads), double-division bug resolution (divisor≠1 skip), and BSEED ZCL broadcast guardrails (per-EP state tracking, 2s windows). Dynamic healing strengthened with passive 0xEF00 listeners for sleepy TS02xx/TS004x devices, eliminating “56 years ago” symptoms, and mains-powered sensors now correctly drop measure_battery. Flow card registration hardened with _flowCardsRegistered guards and SDK3-compliant get[Type]Card usage; multi-gang cards filter by capability (onoff.gangN) not driver_id. PhysicalButtonMixin deduplication and app-command windows tightened to 2s. Analytics, OTA, and quirks layers matured; nightly/monthly automation now triages upstream, scans forks, and enforces caseless fingerprint matching. Action items: integrate the three new TS0601 DPs, validate backlight strings (off/normal/inverted), and extend energy DP heuristics for 101–105 ranges.
